intro: Over a two-week period in April 2026, ZCyberNews published nine articles under the llm tag, covering five high-severity and three medium-severity vulnerabilities. The most prominent issue was CVE-2026-33626, a CVSS 7.5 flaw affecting cloud service providers, enterprise, research, and technology sectors. The coverage also included one informational item, reflecting a concentrated focus on risks to large language model infrastructure during this timeframe.
